/usr/bin/gcc -fPIC -Wall -g -DPCL_PLATFORM_TI_AM625=1 -DPCL_PRODUCT_H200_100P=1 -D_POSIX_C_SOURCE=200809L -D_XOPEN_SOURCE=700 -D_GNU_SOURCE -shared -Wl,-soname,libpcl.so -o libpcl.so CMakeFiles/pcl.dir/src/pcl_api.c.o CMakeFiles/pcl.dir/src/pcl_register.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/wanguo/EMS/products/ccm/apps/ccm_logger/build/hal:/home/wanguo/EMS/products/ccm/apps/ccm_logger/build/osal ../hal/libhal.so ../osal/libosal.so -lpthread -lrt -lm
